# Cbl Log

**Summary**: Cement Bond Log (CBL) is used to evaluate the quality of the cement bond between the casing and the formation.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014]] used CBL logs in conjunction with noise and temperature data to assess casing integrity.

## Key Results and Findings

- Original CBL logs were used as part of a multi-parameter evaluation for well integrity. ([[2014-al-hussain|Al-Hussain, 2014, p. 70]])
